# seoul

Example package for Seoul short course

# Package index

  : Create a Data Frame
- [`foo()`](https://danielinteractive.github.io/seoul/reference/foo.md)
  : Foo Function to Create a Fancy List
- [`hello()`](https://danielinteractive.github.io/seoul/reference/hello.md)
  : Hello Function
